lead.full_text: NEW YORK, NY - More than 11,214 'hopeless cases' volunteered for Dr. Gary Null's historic study. He was hoping that his anti-aging therapies might help some of them. Yet to the utter amazement of skeptics, out of all the thousands who completed his program, every single one of them [got statistically significant improvement]. Not long ago, Harry B. had chronic asthma... agonizing arthritis... a painfully enlarged prostate... a precancerous colon... a blocked coronary artery... Yet Harry began training for a marathon and wound up looking more like 70 than 90... His personal doctors took him off all his asthma inhalers and heart medications... And he's not an exception - just one of over 11,214 study group participants!
lead.hook_sentence: More than 11,214 'hopeless cases' volunteered for Dr. Gary Null's historic study.
lead.transition_to_body: If Dr. Gary Null can do it for frail, old Harry, he can do it for you...
lead.emotional_progression: despair (hopeless cases) → shock (every single one) → inspiration (Harry's transformation) → hope (if Harry at 90, then me) → urgency (get protocol)

three_part_structure.what_they_think_problem_is: Aging is inevitable decline - bulging belly, cholesterol-choked arteries, brain failure, weakness, frozen joints, spotted skin, tumors, Parkinson's, menopausal miseries, fading vision. Multiple chronic conditions require multiple medications. Eventually everyone ends up in nursing home. Nothing can reverse the aging process.
three_part_structure.what_real_problem_is: Aging symptoms all share the same root cause: chronic inflammation and mitochondrial energy failure. Your cells' 'power plants' (mitochondria) can't transport and burn fuel properly as you age. Free radicals from oxidative stress damage DNA and cell structures. Your body lacks sufficient antioxidant power to neutralize this damage. Chronic inflammation gets 'stuck' and destroys arteries, joints, organs. These are NOT separate conditions requiring separate treatments - they're all manifestations of the same cellular energy crisis.
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Conventional medicine treats symptoms separately with drugs (arthritis drug, cholesterol drug, blood pressure drug, etc.) instead of addressing the root cellular energy crisis. Drugs have side effects that create new problems. Most people aren't getting therapeutic doses of the nutrients their mitochondria need to function (CoQ10, alpha-lipoic acid, acetyl-L-carnitine). Their diets contain toxins and estrogen-mimicking pesticides that accelerate aging. They're not doing the cellular detoxification necessary to reverse damage. The comprehensive protocol Dr. Gary Null developed addresses ALL these root causes simultaneously - that's why it reverses multiple conditions at once.

villain_profile.secondary_villain: Toxic modern environment (pesticides, processed foods, stress) that accelerates cellular aging

specimens.quote: More than 11,214 'hopeless cases' volunteered for Dr. Gary Null's historic study. He was hoping that his anti-aging therapies might help some of them. Yet to the utter amazement of skeptics, out of all the thousands who completed his program, every single one of them [had statistically significant improvement]. That's not just good - it's unheard of in mainstream medicine.

Not long ago, Harry B. had chronic asthma... agonizing arthritis... a painfully enlarged prostate... a precancerous colon... a blocked coronary artery... Yet Harry began training for a marathon and wound up looking more like 70 than 90... His personal doctors took him off all his asthma inhalers and heart medications... And he's not an exception - just one of over 11,214 study group participants!

Fred was 175 pounds overweight and it was literally crushing the life out of him. 'I was months away from death,' he says. 'I had congestive heart failure. I was retaining water, vomiting blood... I couldn't lie down anymore because of water crushing my lungs... I tried every kind of diet you could name, [but] I never could stick to it!' Yet thanks to Dr. Gary Null, Fred's entire life turned around in a flash... In 9 months, Fred lost 175 pounds without counting calories, carbs or fat...

Lou's bum ticker was winding down fast. Just a few years after cutting him open for quadruple bypass surgery, his doctors were telling him, 'Sorry, it didn't work!' They told Lou he'd need another bypass immediately. And when he refused, Lou remembers... 'I was told that I had ONE MONTH to live...' Yes, they practically dug his grave for him, but now Lou's dancing on it! Thanks to Dr. Gary Null, Lou's chest pains vanished, his coronary arteries surge with blood again... 'I dance 2 to 3 hours a day!' -Lou, age 76

'Brain surgery left me with numb fingers, fatigue..' -Yvonne. Nothing helped her, until she tried Dr. Gary Null's Power Aging secrets and - Wow, what a difference! 'In a short amount of time,' says Yvonne, 'it was evident that [Dr. Gary Null's program] was working. As I continued, all the symptoms I once had were gone. I am a functioning, healthy woman!'

'We both had memory difficulties...' -Wilma and Myron, age 75. But thanks to Dr. Gary Null, now Wilma and Myron are making youngsters look slow! 'We have increased brainpower,' Wilma confirms. 'This is a wonderful time of life... I study piano and am WRITING A BOOK!'

Thomas quit his engineering job when his Parkinson's tremors became so acute, he couldn't hold a drafting pen. Then his hands started shaking so terribly that he couldn't feed himself. And his mental fatigue became so severe... He couldn't even remember names or numbers... But finally, he heard about Dr. Gary Null. 'What the heck,' Thomas thought. 'I'll give these suggestions a whirl!' And just 3 weeks later, he felt his energy soar as if he were rising from the dead. The brain fog suddenly lifted and his tremors were completely gone... 'These are my happiest and proudest times. I intend to live another 70 years!' -Thomas, age 70

To test exactly how well his arthritis discoveries are working, he enrolled a very special subgroup of people into his Power Aging study. To get into this group, you needed a letter from your doctor confirming that you'd been medically diagnosed with arthritis... SOME HAD SUFFERED FOR OVER 25 YEARS! Their pain wasn't imaginary. All of them really, truly, had chronic arthritis - bad! Yet after using Dr. Gary Null's natural arthritis cure, 87% of them were substantially or completely improved. The pain went away. Inflammation faded or vanished. Frozen limbs moved freely again! And it didn't matter what type of arthritis they had. The treatment relieved both rheumatoid and osteoarthritis... Most were so utterly changed, their own personal doctors TOOK THEM OFF ALL ARTHRITIS MEDICATION...

'I had breast cancer - now gone! No indications of any cancer.' -Grace. 'I had uterine cancer. I had a hysterectomy, however, the cancer returned. [But now] my cancer seems to be in full remission!' -Etta. 'I was diagnosed with lung cancer. [Now] I am cancer free without medication!' -Jean

Suddenly, all of Maria's menopausal problems vanished at once. And she's not alone. Fully 86% of women who tried his natural solution report the cessation of all top 10 menopause miseries. Nearly 9 out of 10 women confirm: 1. No more HOT FLASHES... 2. No more FATIGUE... 3. No more MOOD SWINGS... 4. No more HAIR PROBLEMS... 5. No more THINNING SKIN... 6. No more VAGINAL DRYNESS... 7. No more MUSCLE WASTING... 8. No more FATTENING... 9. No more LIBIDO LOSS... 10. No more URINARY TRACT INFECTIONS...
When 'grumpy old men' started using his breakthrough for male health... 81% boosted their muscle strength... 90% regained lost libido... 55% even improved their moods...

PBS television stations interrupted shows to air the urgent news that this award-winning scientist just wiped out all the indignities of aging. Millions gasped as the results of Dr. Gary Null's 14-year Power Aging study were aired on PBS television stations. Some are calling it the most stunning medical breakthrough of the new century.

bonuses.description: Someday everyone will be taking these hushed-up youth boosters, but why die waiting? NEW studies show they really do deliver results, without the dangers of hormones or drugs. Some are so new that even your doctor has probably never heard of them, but all are inexpensive and readily available. Includes: Nature's only safe Cox-2 inhibitor (blocks pain and inflammation like Vioxx or Celebrex, yet it's as harmless as fruit juice); Shut down the shocking cause of heart attacks (germs hiding deep in your gums raise your heart attack risk up to 400%); Top-rated natural cholesterol pill (cheaper than policosanol - cuts LDL cholesterol by 30%, raises HDL by 40%); Make your body flu-proof; Help your prostate kill its own cancer cells; Push blood pressure down to youthful levels; Bring your eyes back to life with this macular miracle; Stop nerve cells from dying and step up brain function (alpha-lipoic acid); Become virtually immune to stress with cutting-edge nutrient that stops stress hormones from forming.

bonuses.name: FREE GIFT #2: How to Grow 10 Years Younger
bonuses.description: PROVEN: What your doctor never told you about diet, exercise and attitude can slash your real age by 10 years or more! Our scientific team combed through over 33,000 different medical studies and uncovered the shockingly easy techniques that are proven to roll back the years. Not hard! Anyone can do this... Includes: Use the real secret behind the French paradox (not red wine, but something easier) - Age Reduction: 3.1 Years; Eat your fiber at this special time of day and watch its health effects rocket (stops blood sugar spikes, blocks weight gain, slashes risk of artery plaque) - Age Reduction: 0.6 Year; What strawberries and green tea have in common (incredibly potent plant nutrient - get 31mg daily and transform your cell chemistry) - Age Reduction: 3.2 Years; Make vitamin C work much harder (add this inexpensive kicker and it really goes to town) - Age Reduction: 1.0 Year; If you're on low-carb or low-fat diet, stoke up on this lean, green miracle (prevents cancer-causing 'errors' in your DNA) - Age Reduction: 1.2 Years; Hate broccoli? Enjoy this beverage instead (almost twice as high in the nutrient that armors your brain and immune system) - Age Reduction: 3.2 Years; Are you drinking enough coffee to fight off Parkinson's and Alzheimer's? - Age Reduction: 0.3 Year; Here's the best one of all (it's free, feels great, and you can do it driving, watching a movie or even while you're on the telephone) - Age Reduction: Up To 8 Years
